question: What is the position of the soccer ball in the image? Select from the following options: (A) It is on the left side of the image. (B) It is in the center of the image. (C) It is on the right side of the image. (D) Cannot be determined from the given information.
gold_answer: Cannot be determined from the given information
answer_choices: It is on the left side of the image
It is in the center of the image
It is on the right side of the image
Cannot be determined from the given information
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
